3_19_7.AMP: But if it is eaten at all on the third day, it is repulsive; it will not be accepted [by God as an offering].
3_19_7.MSG: If it is eaten on the third day it is polluted meat and not acceptable.
3_19_7.NIV: If any of it is eaten on the third day, it is impure and will not be accepted.
3_19_7.NRSVCE: If it is eaten at all on the third day, it is an abomination; it will not be acceptable.

3_19_8.NKJV: Therefore everyone who eats it shall bear his iniquity, because he has profaned the hallowed offering of the LORD; and that person shall be cut off from his people.
3_19_8.KJV: Therefore every one that eateth it shall bear his iniquity, because he hath profaned the hallowed thing of the LORD: and that soul shall be cut off from among his people.
3_19_8.ESV: and everyone who eats it shall bear his iniquity, because he has profaned what is holy to the LORD, and that person shall be cut off from his people.
3_19_8.NASB: 'Everyone who eats it will bear his iniquity, for he has profaned the holy thing of the LORD; and that person shall be cut off from his people.
3_19_8.NLT: Anyone who eats it on the third day will be punished for defiling what is holy to the LORD and will be cut off from the community.
3_19_8.WEB: but everyone who eats it shall bear his iniquity, because he has profaned the holy thing of Yahweh, and that soul shall be cut off from his people.
3_19_8.CSB17: Anyone who eats it will bear his iniquity, for he has profaned what is holy to the LORD. That person is to be cut off from his people.
3_19_8.AMP: Everyone who eats it will bear [the responsibility for] his wickedness, for he has profaned a holy thing of the LORD; and that person shall be cut off from his people [excluding him from the atonement made for them].
3_19_8.MSG: Whoever eats it will be held responsible because he has violated what is holy to God. That person will be cut off from his people.
3_19_8.NIV: Whoever eats it will be held responsible because he has desecrated what is holy to the Lord; that person must be cut off from his people.
3_19_8.NRSVCE: All who eat it shall be subject to punishment, because they have profaned what is holy to the LORD; and any such person shall be cut off from the people.

3_19_9.NKJV: ‘When you reap the harvest of your land, you shall not wholly reap the corners of your field, nor shall you gather the gleanings of your harvest.
3_19_9.KJV: And when ye reap the harvest of your land, thou shalt not wholly reap the corners of thy field, neither shalt thou gather the gleanings of thy harvest.
3_19_9.ESV: “When you reap the harvest of your land, you shall not reap your field right up to its edge, neither shall you gather the gleanings after your harvest.
3_19_9.NASB: 'Now when you reap the harvest of your land, you shall not reap to the very corners of your field, nor shall you gather the gleanings of your harvest.
3_19_9.NLT: “When you harvest the crops of your land, do not harvest the grain along the edges of your fields, and do not pick up what the harvesters drop.
3_19_9.WEB: “‘When you reap the harvest of your land, you shall not wholly reap the corners of your field, neither shall you gather the gleanings of your harvest.
3_19_9.CSB17: “When you reap the harvest of your land, you are not to reap to the very edge of your field or gather the gleanings of your harvest.
3_19_9.AMP: 'Now when you reap the harvest of your land, you shall not reap to the very corners of your field, nor shall you gather the gleanings (grain left after reaping) of your harvest.
3_19_9.MSG: "When you harvest your land, don't harvest right up to the edges of your field or gather the gleanings from the harvest.
3_19_9.NIV: “‘When you reap the harvest of your land, do not reap to the very edges of your field or gather the gleanings of your harvest.
3_19_9.NRSVCE: When you reap the harvest of your land, you shall not reap to the very edges of your field, or gather the gleanings of your harvest.

3_19_10.NKJV: And you shall not glean your vineyard, nor shall you gather every grape of your vineyard; you shall leave them for the poor and the stranger: I am the LORD your God.
3_19_10.KJV: And thou shalt not glean thy vineyard, neither shalt thou gather every grape of thy vineyard; thou shalt leave them for the poor and stranger: I am the LORD your God.
3_19_10.ESV: And you shall not strip your vineyard bare, neither shall you gather the fallen grapes of your vineyard. You shall leave them for the poor and for the sojourner: I am the LORD your God.
3_19_10.NASB: 'Nor shall you glean your vineyard, nor shall you gather the fallen fruit of your vineyard; you shall leave them for the needy and for the stranger. I am the LORD your God.
3_19_10.NLT: It is the same with your grape crop — do not strip every last bunch of grapes from the vines, and do not pick up the grapes that fall to the ground. Leave them for the poor and the foreigners living among you. I am the LORD your God.
3_19_10.WEB: You shall not glean your vineyard, neither shall you gather the fallen grapes of your vineyard. You shall leave them for the poor and for the foreigner. I am Yahweh your God.
3_19_10.CSB17: Do not strip your vineyard bare or gather its fallen grapes. Leave them for the poor and the resident alien; I am the LORD your God.
3_19_10.AMP: And you shall not glean your vineyard, nor shall you gather its fallen grapes; you shall leave them for the poor and for the stranger. I am the LORD your God.
3_19_10.MSG: Don't strip your vineyard bare or go back and pick up the fallen grapes. Leave them for the poor and the foreigner. I am God, your God.
3_19_10.NIV: Do not go over your vineyard a second time or pick up the grapes that have fallen. Leave them for the poor and the alien. I am the Lord your God.
3_19_10.NRSVCE: You shall not strip your vineyard bare, or gather the fallen grapes of your vineyard; you shall leave them for the poor and the alien: I am the LORD your God.

3_19_11.NKJV: ‘You shall not steal, nor deal falsely, nor lie to one another.
3_19_11.KJV: Ye shall not steal, neither deal falsely, neither lie one to another.
3_19_11.ESV: “You shall not steal; you shall not deal falsely; you shall not lie to one another.
3_19_11.NASB: 'You shall not steal, nor deal falsely, nor lie to one another.
3_19_11.NLT: “Do not steal. “Do not deceive or cheat one another.
3_19_11.WEB: “‘You shall not steal. “‘You shall not lie. “‘You shall not deceive one another.
3_19_11.CSB17: “Do not steal. Do not act deceptively or lie to one another.
3_19_11.AMP: 'You shall not steal, nor deal deceptively, nor lie to one another.
3_19_11.NIV: “‘Do not steal.“‘Do not lie.“‘Do not deceive one another.
3_19_11.NRSVCE: You shall not steal; you shall not deal falsely; and you shall not lie to one another.

3_19_12.NKJV: And you shall not swear by My name falsely, nor shall you profane the name of your God: I am the LORD.
3_19_12.KJV: And ye shall not swear by my name falsely, neither shalt thou profane the name of thy God: I am the LORD.
3_19_12.ESV: You shall not swear by my name falsely, and so profane the name of your God: I am the LORD.
3_19_12.NASB: 'You shall not swear falsely by My name, so as to profane the name of your God; I am the LORD.
3_19_12.NLT: “Do not bring shame on the name of your God by using it to swear falsely. I am the LORD.
3_19_12.WEB: “‘You shall not swear by my name falsely, and profane the name of your God. I am Yahweh.
3_19_12.CSB17: Do not swear falsely by my name, profaning the name of your God; I am the LORD.
3_19_12.AMP: You shall not swear [an oath] falsely by My name, so as to profane the name of your God; I am the LORD.
3_19_12.MSG: "Don't swear falsely using my name, violating the name of your God. I am God.
3_19_12.NIV: “‘Do not swear falsely by my name and so profane the name of your God. I am the Lord.
3_19_12.NRSVCE: And you shall not swear falsely by my name, profaning the name of your God: I am the LORD.

3_19_13.NKJV: ‘You shall not cheat your neighbor, nor rob him. The wages of him who is hired shall not remain with you all night until morning.
3_19_13.KJV: Thou shalt not defraud thy neighbour, neither rob him: the wages of him that is hired shall not abide with thee all night until the morning.
3_19_13.ESV: “You shall not oppress your neighbor or rob him. The wages of a hired worker shall not remain with you all night until the morning.
3_19_13.NASB: 'You shall not oppress your neighbor, nor rob [him]. The wages of a hired man are not to remain with you all night until morning.
3_19_13.NLT: “Do not defraud or rob your neighbor. “Do not make your hired workers wait until the next day to receive their pay.
3_19_13.WEB: “‘You shall not oppress your neighbor, nor rob him. “‘The wages of a hired servant shall not remain with you all night until the morning.
3_19_13.CSB17: “Do not oppress your neighbor or rob him. The wages due a hired worker must not remain with you until morning.
3_19_13.AMP: 'You shall not oppress or exploit your neighbor, nor rob him. You shall not withhold the wages of a hired man overnight until morning.
3_19_13.MSG: "Don't exploit your friend or rob him."Don't hold back the wages of a hired hand overnight.
3_19_13.NIV: “‘Do not defraud your neighbor or rob him.“‘Do not hold back the wages of a hired man overnight.
3_19_13.NRSVCE: You shall not defraud your neighbor; you shall not steal; and you shall not keep for yourself the wages of a laborer until morning.

3_19_14.NKJV: You shall not curse the deaf, nor put a stumbling block before the blind, but shall fear your God: I am the LORD.
3_19_14.KJV: Thou shalt not curse the deaf, nor put a stumblingblock before the blind, but shalt fear thy God: I am the LORD.
3_19_14.ESV: You shall not curse the deaf or put a stumbling block before the blind, but you shall fear your God: I am the LORD.
3_19_14.NASB: 'You shall not curse a deaf man, nor place a stumbling block before the blind, but you shall revere your God; I am the LORD.
3_19_14.NLT: “Do not insult the deaf or cause the blind to stumble. You must fear your God; I am the LORD.
3_19_14.WEB: “‘You shall not curse the deaf, nor put a stumbling block before the blind; but you shall fear your God. I am Yahweh.
3_19_14.CSB17: Do not curse the deaf or put a stumbling block in front of the blind, but you are to fear your God; I am the LORD.
3_19_14.AMP: You shall not curse a deaf man nor put a stumbling block before the blind, but you shall fear your God [with profound reverence]; I am the LORD.
3_19_14.MSG: "Don't curse the deaf; don't put a stumbling block in front of the blind; fear your God. I am God.
3_19_14.NIV: “‘Do not curse the deaf or put a stumbling block in front of the blind, but fear your God. I am the Lord.
3_19_14.NRSVCE: You shall not revile the deaf or put a stumbling block before the blind; you shall fear your God: I am the LORD.

3_19_15.NKJV: ‘You shall do no injustice in judgment. You shall not be partial to the poor, nor honor the person of the mighty. In righteousness you shall judge your neighbor.
3_19_15.KJV: Ye shall do no unrighteousness in judgment: thou shalt not respect the person of the poor, nor honour the person of the mighty: but in righteousness shalt thou judge thy neighbour.
3_19_15.ESV: “You shall do no injustice in court. You shall not be partial to the poor or defer to the great, but in righteousness shall you judge your neighbor.
3_19_15.NASB: 'You shall do no injustice in judgment; you shall not be partial to the poor nor defer to the great, but you are to judge your neighbor fairly.
3_19_15.NLT: “Do not twist justice in legal matters by favoring the poor or being partial to the rich and powerful. Always judge people fairly.
3_19_15.WEB: “‘You shall do no injustice in judgment. You shall not be partial to the poor, nor show favoritism to the great; but you shall judge your neighbor in righteousness.
3_19_15.CSB17: “Do not act unjustly when deciding a case. Do not be partial to the poor or give preference to the rich; judge your neighbor fairly.
3_19_15.AMP: 'You shall not do injustice in judgment; you shall not be partial to the poor nor show a preference for the great, but judge your neighbor fairly.
3_19_15.MSG: "Don't pervert justice. Don't show favoritism to either the poor or the great. Judge on the basis of what is right.
3_19_15.NIV: “‘Do not pervert justice; do not show partiality to the poor or favoritism to the great, but judge your neighbor fairly.
3_19_15.NRSVCE: You shall not render an unjust judgment; you shall not be partial to the poor or defer to the great: with justice you shall judge your neighbor.

3_19_16.NKJV: You shall not go about as a talebearer among your people; nor shall you take a stand against the life of your neighbor: I am the LORD.
3_19_16.KJV: Thou shalt not go up and down as a talebearer among thy people: neither shalt thou stand against the blood of thy neighbour: I am the LORD.
3_19_16.ESV: You shall not go around as a slanderer among your people, and you shall not stand up against the life of your neighbor: I am the LORD.
3_19_16.NASB: 'You shall not go about as a slanderer among your people, and you are not to act against the life of your neighbor; I am the LORD.
3_19_16.NLT: “Do not spread slanderous gossip among your people. “Do not stand idly by when your neighbor’s life is threatened. I am the LORD.
3_19_16.WEB: “‘You shall not go up and down as a slanderer among your people. “‘You shall not endanger the life of your neighbor. I am Yahweh.
3_19_16.CSB17: Do not go about spreading slander among your people; do not jeopardize your neighbor’s life; I am the LORD.
3_19_16.AMP: You shall not go around as a gossip among your people, and you are not to act against the life of your neighbor [with slander or false testimony]; I am the LORD.
3_19_16.MSG: "Don't spread gossip and rumors."Don't just stand by when your neighbor's life is in danger. I am God.
3_19_16.NIV: “‘Do not go about spreading slander among your people.“‘Do not do anything that endangers your neighbor’s life. I am the Lord.
3_19_16.NRSVCE: You shall not go around as a slanderer among your people, and you shall not profit by the blood of your neighbor: I am the LORD.

3_19_17.NKJV: ‘You shall not hate your brother in your heart. You shall surely rebuke your neighbor, and not bear sin because of him.
3_19_17.KJV: Thou shalt not hate thy brother in thine heart: thou shalt in any wise rebuke thy neighbour, and not suffer sin upon him. and: or, that thou bear not sin for him
3_19_17.ESV: “You shall not hate your brother in your heart, but you shall reason frankly with your neighbor, lest you incur sin because of him.
3_19_17.NASB: 'You shall not hate your fellow countryman in your heart; you may surely reprove your neighbor, but shall not incur sin because of him.
3_19_17.NLT: “Do not nurse hatred in your heart for any of your relatives. Confront people directly so you will not be held guilty for their sin.
3_19_17.WEB: “‘You shall not hate your brother in your heart. You shall surely rebuke your neighbor, and not bear sin because of him.
3_19_17.CSB17: “Do not harbor hatred against your brother. Rebuke your neighbor directly, and you will not incur guilt because of him.
3_19_17.AMP: 'You shall not hate your brother in your heart; you may most certainly rebuke your neighbor, but shall not incur sin because of him.
3_19_17.MSG: "Don't secretly hate your neighbor. If you have something against him, get it out into the open; otherwise you are an accomplice in his guilt.
3_19_17.NIV: “‘Do not hate your brother in your heart. Rebuke your neighbor frankly so you will not share in his guilt.
3_19_17.NRSVCE: You shall not hate in your heart anyone of your kin; you shall reprove your neighbor, or you will incur guilt yourself.

3_19_18.NKJV: You shall not take vengeance, nor bear any grudge against the children of your people, but you shall love your neighbor as yourself: I am the LORD.
3_19_18.KJV: Thou shalt not avenge, nor bear any grudge against the children of thy people, but thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself: I am the LORD.
3_19_18.ESV: You shall not take vengeance or bear a grudge against the sons of your own people, but you shall love your neighbor as yourself: I am the LORD.
3_19_18.NASB: 'You shall not take vengeance, nor bear any grudge against the sons of your people, but you shall love your neighbor as yourself; I am the LORD.
3_19_18.NLT: “Do not seek revenge or bear a grudge against a fellow Israelite, but love your neighbor as yourself. I am the LORD.
3_19_18.WEB: “‘You shall not take vengeance, nor bear any grudge against the children of your people; but you shall love your neighbor as yourself. I am Yahweh.
3_19_18.CSB17: Do not take revenge or bear a grudge against members of your community, but love your neighbor as yourself; I am the LORD.
3_19_18.AMP: You shall not take revenge nor bear any grudge against the sons of your people, but you shall love your neighbor (acquaintance, associate, companion) as yourself; I am the LORD.
3_19_18.MSG: "Don't seek revenge or carry a grudge against any of your people."Love your neighbor as yourself. I am God.
3_19_18.NIV: “‘Do not seek revenge or bear a grudge against one of your people, but love your neighbor as yourself. I am the Lord.
3_19_18.NRSVCE: You shall not take vengeance or bear a grudge against any of your people, but you shall love your neighbor as yourself: I am the LORD.

3_19_19.NKJV: ‘You shall keep My statutes. You shall not let your livestock breed with another kind. You shall not sow your field with mixed seed. Nor shall a garment of mixed linen and wool come upon you.
3_19_19.KJV: Ye shall keep my statutes. Thou shalt not let thy cattle gender with a diverse kind: thou shalt not sow thy field with mingled seed: neither shall a garment mingled of linen and woollen come upon thee.
3_19_19.ESV: “You shall keep my statutes. You shall not let your cattle breed with a different kind. You shall not sow your field with two kinds of seed, nor shall you wear a garment of cloth made of two kinds of material.
3_19_19.NASB: 'You are to keep My statutes. You shall not breed together two kinds of your cattle; you shall not sow your field with two kinds of seed, nor wear a garment upon you of two kinds of material mixed together.
3_19_19.NLT: “You must obey all my decrees. “Do not mate two different kinds of animals. Do not plant your field with two different kinds of seed. Do not wear clothing woven from two different kinds of thread.
3_19_19.WEB: “‘You shall keep my statutes. “‘You shall not cross-breed different kinds of animals. “‘You shall not sow your field with two kinds of seed; “‘Don’t wear a garment made of two kinds of material.
3_19_19.CSB17: “You are to keep my statutes. Do not crossbreed two different kinds of your livestock, sow your fields with two kinds of seed, or put on a garment made of two kinds of material.
3_19_19.AMP: 'You are to keep My statutes. You shall not breed together two kinds of your cattle; you shall not sow your field with two kinds of seed, nor wear clothing of two kinds of material mixed together.
3_19_19.MSG: "Keep my decrees."Don't mate two different kinds of animals."Don't plant your fields with two kinds of seed."Don't wear clothes woven of two kinds of material.
3_19_19.NIV: “‘Keep my decrees.“‘Do not mate different kinds of animals.“‘Do not plant your field with two kinds of seed.“‘Do not wear clothing woven of two kinds of material.
3_19_19.NRSVCE: You shall keep my statutes. You shall not let your animals breed with a different kind; you shall not sow your field with two kinds of seed; nor shall you put on a garment made of two different materials.

3_19_20.NKJV: ‘Whoever lies carnally with a woman who is betrothed to a man as a concubine, and who has not at all been redeemed nor given her freedom, for this there shall be scourging; but they shall not be put to death, because she was not free.
3_19_20.KJV: And whosoever lieth carnally with a woman, that is a bondmaid, betrothed to an husband, and not at all redeemed, nor freedom given her; she shall be scourged; they shall not be put to death, because she was not free. betrothed: or, abused by any: Heb. reproached by (or, for) man she shall: or, they, etc: Heb. there shall be a scourging
3_19_20.ESV: “If a man lies sexually with a woman who is a slave, assigned to another man and not yet ransomed or given her freedom, a distinction shall be made. They shall not be put to death, because she was not free;
3_19_20.NASB: 'Now if a man lies carnally with a woman who is a slave acquired for [another] man, but who has in no way been redeemed nor given her freedom, there shall be punishment; they shall not, [however], be put to death, because she was not free.
3_19_20.NLT: “If a man has sex with a slave girl whose freedom has never been purchased but who is committed to become another man’s wife, he must pay full compensation to her master. But since she is not a free woman, neither the man nor the woman will be put to death.
3_19_20.WEB: “‘If a man lies carnally with a woman who is a slave girl, pledged to be married to another man, and not ransomed, or given her freedom; they shall be punished. They shall not be put to death, because she was not free.
3_19_20.CSB17: “If a man has sexual intercourse with a woman who is a slave designated for another man, but she has not been redeemed or given her freedom, there must be punishment. They are not to be put to death, because she had not been freed.
3_19_20.AMP: 'Now if a man has intimate relations with a woman who is a slave acquired for [marriage to] another man, but who has not been redeemed nor given her freedom, there shall be punishment [after an investigation]; they shall not be put to death, because she was not free;
3_19_20.MSG: "If a man has sex with a slave girl who is engaged to another man but has not yet been ransomed or given her freedom, there must be an investigation. But they aren't to be put to death because she wasn't free.
3_19_20.NIV: “‘If a man sleeps with a woman who is a slave girl promised to another man but who has not been ransomed or given her freedom, there must be due punishment. Yet they are not to be put to death, because she had not been freed.
3_19_20.NRSVCE: If a man has sexual relations with a woman who is a slave, designated for another man but not ransomed or given her freedom, an inquiry shall be held. They shall not be put to death, since she has not been freed;

3_19_21.NKJV: And he shall bring his trespass offering to the LORD, to the door of the tabernacle of meeting, a ram as a trespass offering.
3_19_21.KJV: And he shall bring his trespass offering unto the LORD, unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, even a ram for a trespass offering.
3_19_21.ESV: but he shall bring his compensation to the LORD, to the entrance of the tent of meeting, a ram for a guilt offering.
3_19_21.NASB: 'He shall bring his guilt offering to the LORD to the doorway of the tent of meeting, a ram for a guilt offering.
3_19_21.NLT: The man, however, must bring a ram as a guilt offering and present it to the LORD at the entrance of the Tabernacle.
3_19_21.WEB: He shall bring his trespass offering to Yahweh, to the door of the Tent of Meeting, even a ram for a trespass offering.
3_19_21.CSB17: However, he must bring a ram as his guilt offering to the LORD at the entrance to the tent of meeting.
3_19_21.AMP: but he shall bring his guilt offering to the LORD to the doorway of the Tent of Meeting, a ram as a guilt offering.
3_19_21.MSG: The man must bring a Compensation-Offering to God at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting, a ram of compensation.
3_19_21.NIV: The man, however, must bring a ram to the entrance to the Tent of Meeting for a guilt offering to the Lord.
3_19_21.NRSVCE: but he shall bring a guilt offering for himself to the LORD, at the entrance of the tent of meeting, a ram as guilt offering.

3_19_22.NKJV: The priest shall make atonement for him with the ram of the trespass offering before the LORD for his sin which he has committed. And the sin which he has committed shall be forgiven him.
3_19_22.KJV: And the priest shall make an atonement for him with the ram of the trespass offering before the LORD for his sin which he hath done: and the sin which he hath done shall be forgiven him.
3_19_22.ESV: And the priest shall make atonement for him with the ram of the guilt offering before the LORD for his sin that he has committed, and he shall be forgiven for the sin that he has committed.
3_19_22.NASB: 'The priest shall also make atonement for him with the ram of the guilt offering before the LORD for his sin which he has committed, and the sin which he has committed will be forgiven him.
3_19_22.NLT: The priest will then purify him before the LORD with the ram of the guilt offering, and the man’s sin will be forgiven.
3_19_22.WEB: The priest shall make atonement for him with the ram of the trespass offering before Yahweh for his sin which he has committed: and the sin which he has committed shall be forgiven him.
3_19_22.CSB17: The priest will make atonement on his behalf before the LORD with the ram of the guilt offering for the sin he has committed, and he will be forgiven for the sin he committed.
3_19_22.AMP: The priest shall make atonement for him with the ram of the guilt offering before the LORD for his sin which he has committed; and he shall be forgiven for his sin.
3_19_22.MSG: The priest will perform the ritual of atonement for him before God with the ram of compensation for the sin he has committed. Then he will stand forgiven of the sin he committed.
3_19_22.NIV: With the ram of the guilt offering the priest is to make atonement for him before the Lord for the sin he has committed, and his sin will be forgiven.
3_19_22.NRSVCE: And the priest shall make atonement for him with the ram of guilt offering before the LORD for his sin that he committed; and the sin he committed shall be forgiven him.

3_19_23.NKJV: ‘When you come into the land, and have planted all kinds of trees for food, then you shall count their fruit as uncircumcised. Three years it shall be as uncircumcised to you. It shall not be eaten.
3_19_23.KJV: And when ye shall come into the land, and shall have planted all manner of trees for food, then ye shall count the fruit thereof as uncircumcised : three years shall it be as uncircumcised unto you: it shall not be eaten of.
3_19_23.ESV: “When you come into the land and plant any kind of tree for food, then you shall regard its fruit as forbidden. Three years it shall be forbidden to you; it must not be eaten.
3_19_23.NASB: 'When you enter the land and plant all kinds of trees for food, then you shall count their fruit as forbidden. Three years it shall be forbidden to you; [it] shall not be eaten.
3_19_23.NLT: “When you enter the land and plant fruit trees, leave the fruit unharvested for the first three years and consider it forbidden. Do not eat it.
3_19_23.WEB: “‘When you come into the land, and have planted all kinds of trees for food, then you shall count their fruit as forbidden. Three years they shall be forbidden to you. It shall not be eaten.
3_19_23.CSB17: “When you come into the land and plant any kind of tree for food, you are to consider the fruit forbidden. It will be forbidden to you for three years; it is not to be eaten.
3_19_23.AMP: 'When you enter the land and plant all kinds of trees for food, then you shall consider their fruit forbidden. For three years the fruit shall be forbidden to you; it shall not be eaten.
3_19_23.MSG: "When you enter the land and plant any kind of fruit tree, don't eat the fruit for three years; consider it inedible.
3_19_23.NIV: “‘When you enter the land and plant any kind of fruit tree, regard its fruit as forbidden. For three years you are to consider it forbidden; it must not be eaten.
3_19_23.NRSVCE: When you come into the land and plant all kinds of trees for food, then you shall regard their fruit as forbidden; three years it shall be forbidden to you, it must not be eaten.

3_19_24.NKJV: But in the fourth year all its fruit shall be holy, a praise to the LORD.
3_19_24.KJV: But in the fourth year all the fruit thereof shall be holy to praise the LORD withal. holy: Heb. holiness of praises to the LORD
3_19_24.ESV: And in the fourth year all its fruit shall be holy, an offering of praise to the LORD.
3_19_24.NASB: 'But in the fourth year all its fruit shall be holy, an offering of praise to the LORD.
3_19_24.NLT: In the fourth year the entire crop must be consecrated to the LORD as a celebration of praise.
3_19_24.WEB: But in the fourth year all its fruit shall be holy, for giving praise to Yahweh.
3_19_24.CSB17: In the fourth year all its fruit is to be consecrated as a praise offering to the LORD.
3_19_24.AMP: In the fourth year all the fruit shall be holy, an offering of praise to the LORD.
3_19_24.MSG: By the fourth year its fruit is holy, an offering of praise to God.
3_19_24.NIV: In the fourth year all its fruit will be holy, an offering of praise to the Lord.
3_19_24.NRSVCE: In the fourth year all their fruit shall be set apart for rejoicing in the LORD.

3_19_25.NKJV: And in the fifth year you may eat its fruit, that it may yield to you its increase: I am the LORD your God.
3_19_25.KJV: And in the fifth year shall ye eat of the fruit thereof, that it may yield unto you the increase thereof: I am the LORD your God.
3_19_25.ESV: But in the fifth year you may eat of its fruit, to increase its yield for you: I am the LORD your God.
3_19_25.NASB: 'In the fifth year you are to eat of its fruit, that its yield may increase for you; I am the LORD your God.
3_19_25.NLT: Finally, in the fifth year you may eat the fruit. If you follow this pattern, your harvest will increase. I am the LORD your God.
3_19_25.WEB: In the fifth year you shall eat its fruit, that it may yield its increase to you. I am Yahweh your God.
3_19_25.CSB17: But in the fifth year you may eat its fruit. In this way its yield will increase for you; I am the LORD your God.
3_19_25.AMP: In the fifth year you may eat the fruit [of the trees], this is so that their yield may increase for you; I am the LORD your God.
3_19_25.MSG: Beginning in the fifth year you can eat its fruit; you'll have richer harvests this way. I am God, your God.
3_19_25.NIV: But in the fifth year you may eat its fruit. In this way your harvest will be increased. I am the Lord your God.
3_19_25.NRSVCE: But in the fifth year you may eat of their fruit, that their yield may be increased for you: I am the LORD your God.

3_19_26.NKJV: ‘You shall not eat anything with the blood, nor shall you practice divination or soothsaying.
3_19_26.KJV: Ye shall not eat any thing with the blood: neither shall ye use enchantment, nor observe times.
3_19_26.ESV: “You shall not eat any flesh with the blood in it. You shall not interpret omens or tell fortunes.
3_19_26.NASB: 'You shall not eat [anything] with the blood, nor practice divination or soothsaying.
3_19_26.NLT: “Do not eat meat that has not been drained of its blood. “Do not practice fortune-telling or witchcraft.
3_19_26.WEB: “‘You shall not eat any meat with the blood still in it. You shall not use enchantments, nor practice sorcery.
3_19_26.CSB17: “You are not to eat anything with blood in it. You are not to practice divination or witchcraft.
3_19_26.AMP: 'You shall not eat anything with the blood, nor practice divination [using omens or witchcraft] or soothsaying.
3_19_26.MSG: "Don't eat meat with blood in it."Don't practice divination or sorcery.
3_19_26.NIV: “‘Do not eat any meat with the blood still in it.“‘Do not practice divination or sorcery.
3_19_26.NRSVCE: You shall not eat anything with its blood. You shall not practice augury or witchcraft.

3_19_27.NKJV: You shall not shave around the sides of your head, nor shall you disfigure the edges of your beard.
3_19_27.KJV: Ye shall not round the corners of your heads, neither shalt thou mar the corners of thy beard.
3_19_27.ESV: You shall not round off the hair on your temples or mar the edges of your beard.
3_19_27.NASB: 'You shall not round off the side-growth of your heads nor harm the edges of your beard.
3_19_27.NLT: “Do not trim off the hair on your temples or trim your beards.
3_19_27.WEB: “‘You shall not cut the hair on the sides of your head or clip off the edge of your beard.
3_19_27.CSB17: You are not to cut off the hair at the sides of your head or mar the edge of your beard.
3_19_27.AMP: You shall not trim and round off the side-growth of [the hair on] your heads, nor mar the edges of your beard.
3_19_27.MSG: "Don't cut the hair on the sides of your head or trim your beard.
3_19_27.NIV: “‘Do not cut the hair at the sides of your head or clip off the edges of your beard.
3_19_27.NRSVCE: You shall not round off the hair on your temples or mar the edges of your beard.

3_19_28.NKJV: You shall not make any cuttings in your flesh for the dead, nor tattoo any marks on you: I am the LORD.
3_19_28.KJV: Ye shall not make any cuttings in your flesh for the dead, nor print any marks upon you: I am the LORD.
3_19_28.ESV: You shall not make any cuts on your body for the dead or tattoo yourselves: I am the LORD.
3_19_28.NASB: 'You shall not make any cuts in your body for the dead nor make any tattoo marks on yourselves: I am the LORD.
3_19_28.NLT: “Do not cut your bodies for the dead, and do not mark your skin with tattoos. I am the LORD.
3_19_28.WEB: “‘You shall not make any cuttings in your flesh for the dead, nor tattoo any marks on you. I am Yahweh.
3_19_28.CSB17: You are not to make gashes on your bodies for the dead or put tattoo marks on yourselves; I am the LORD.
3_19_28.AMP: You shall not make any cuts on your body [in mourning] for the dead, nor make any tattoo marks on yourselves; I am the LORD.
3_19_28.MSG: "Don't gash your bodies on behalf of the dead."Don't tattoo yourselves. I am God.
3_19_28.NIV: “‘Do not cut your bodies for the dead or put tattoo marks on yourselves. I am the Lord.
3_19_28.NRSVCE: You shall not make any gashes in your flesh for the dead or tattoo any marks upon you: I am the LORD.

3_19_29.NKJV: ‘Do not prostitute your daughter, to cause her to be a harlot, lest the land fall into harlotry, and the land become full of wickedness.
3_19_29.KJV: Do not prostitute thy daughter, to cause her to be a whore; lest the land fall to whoredom, and the land become full of wickedness. prostitute: Heb. profane
3_19_29.ESV: “Do not profane your daughter by making her a prostitute, lest the land fall into prostitution and the land become full of depravity.
3_19_29.NASB: 'Do not profane your daughter by making her a harlot, so that the land will not fall to harlotry and the land become full of lewdness.
3_19_29.NLT: “Do not defile your daughter by making her a prostitute, or the land will be filled with prostitution and wickedness.
3_19_29.WEB: “‘Don’t profane your daughter, to make her a prostitute; lest the land fall to prostitution, and the land become full of wickedness.
3_19_29.CSB17: “Do not debase your daughter by making her a prostitute, or the land will be prostituted and filled with depravity.
3_19_29.AMP: 'Do not profane your daughter by making her a prostitute, so that the land will not fall to prostitution and become full of wickedness.
3_19_29.MSG: "Don't violate your daughter by making her a whore—the whole country would soon become a brothel, filled with sordid sex.
3_19_29.NIV: “‘Do not degrade your daughter by making her a prostitute, or the land will turn to prostitution and be filled with wickedness.
3_19_29.NRSVCE: Do not profane your daughter by making her a prostitute, that the land not become prostituted and full of depravity.

3_19_30.NKJV: ‘You shall keep My Sabbaths and reverence My sanctuary: I am the LORD.
3_19_30.KJV: Ye shall keep my sabbaths, and reverence my sanctuary: I am the LORD.
3_19_30.ESV: You shall keep my Sabbaths and reverence my sanctuary: I am the LORD.
3_19_30.NASB: 'You shall keep My sabbaths and revere My sanctuary; I am the LORD.
3_19_30.NLT: “Keep my Sabbath days of rest, and show reverence toward my sanctuary. I am the LORD.
3_19_30.WEB: “‘You shall keep my Sabbaths, and reverence my sanctuary; I am Yahweh.
3_19_30.CSB17: Keep my Sabbaths and revere my sanctuary; I am the LORD.
3_19_30.AMP: You shall keep My Sabbaths and revere My sanctuary. I am the LORD.
3_19_30.MSG: "Keep my Sabbaths and revere my Sanctuary: I am God.
3_19_30.NIV: “‘Observe my Sabbaths and have reverence for my sanctuary. I am the Lord.
3_19_30.NRSVCE: You shall keep my sabbaths and reverence my sanctuary: I am the LORD.

3_19_31.NKJV: ‘Give no regard to mediums and familiar spirits; do not seek after them, to be defiled by them: I am the LORD your God.
3_19_31.KJV: Regard not them that have familiar spirits, neither seek after wizards, to be defiled by them: I am the LORD your God.
3_19_31.ESV: “Do not turn to mediums or necromancers; do not seek them out, and so make yourselves unclean by them: I am the LORD your God.
3_19_31.NASB: 'Do not turn to mediums or spiritists; do not seek them out to be defiled by them. I am the LORD your God.
3_19_31.NLT: “Do not defile yourselves by turning to mediums or to those who consult the spirits of the dead. I am the LORD your God.
3_19_31.WEB: “‘Don’t turn to those who are mediums, nor to the wizards. Don’t seek them out, to be defiled by them. I am Yahweh your God.
3_19_31.CSB17: “Do not turn to mediums or consult spiritists, or you will be defiled by them; I am the LORD your God.
3_19_31.AMP: 'Do not turn to mediums [who pretend to consult the dead] or to spiritists [who have spirits of divination]; do not seek them out to be defiled by them. I am the LORD your God.
3_19_31.MSG: "Don't dabble in the occult or traffic with mediums; you'll pollute your souls. I am God, your God.
3_19_31.NIV: “‘Do not turn to mediums or seek out spiritists, for you will be defiled by them. I am the Lord your God.
3_19_31.NRSVCE: Do not turn to mediums or wizards; do not seek them out, to be defiled by them: I am the LORD your God.

3_19_32.NKJV: ‘You shall rise before the gray headed and honor the presence of an old man, and fear your God: I am the LORD.
3_19_32.KJV: Thou shalt rise up before the hoary head, and honour the face of the old man, and fear thy God: I am the LORD.
3_19_32.ESV: “You shall stand up before the gray head and honor the face of an old man, and you shall fear your God: I am the LORD.
3_19_32.NASB: 'You shall rise up before the grayheaded and honor the aged, and you shall revere your God; I am the LORD.
3_19_32.NLT: “Stand up in the presence of the elderly, and show respect for the aged. Fear your God. I am the LORD.
3_19_32.WEB: “‘You shall rise up before the gray head, and honor the face of an old man, and you shall fear your God. I am Yahweh.
3_19_32.CSB17: “You are to rise in the presence of the elderly and honor the old. Fear your God; I am the LORD.
3_19_32.AMP: 'You shall rise before the gray-headed and honor the aged, and you shall fear your God [with profound reverence]; I am the LORD.
3_19_32.MSG: "Show respect to the aged; honor the presence of an elder; fear your God. I am God.
3_19_32.NIV: “‘Rise in the presence of the aged, show respect for the elderly and revere your God. I am the Lord.
3_19_32.NRSVCE: You shall rise before the aged, and defer to the old; and you shall fear your God: I am the LORD.

3_19_33.NKJV: ‘And if a stranger dwells with you in your land, you shall not mistreat him.
3_19_33.KJV: And if a stranger sojourn with thee in your land, ye shall not vex him. vex: or, oppress
3_19_33.ESV: “When a stranger sojourns with you in your land, you shall not do him wrong.
3_19_33.NASB: 'When a stranger resides with you in your land, you shall not do him wrong.
3_19_33.NLT: “Do not take advantage of foreigners who live among you in your land.
3_19_33.WEB: “‘If a stranger lives as a foreigner with you in your land, you shall not do him wrong.
3_19_33.CSB17: “When an alien resides with you in your land, you must not oppress him.
3_19_33.AMP: 'When a stranger resides with you in your land, you shall not oppress or mistreat him.
3_19_33.MSG: "When a foreigner lives with you in your land, don't take advantage of him.
3_19_33.NIV: “‘When an alien lives with you in your land, do not mistreat him.
3_19_33.NRSVCE: When an alien resides with you in your land, you shall not oppress the alien.

3_19_34.NKJV: The stranger who dwells among you shall be to you as one born among you, and you shall love him as yourself; for you were strangers in the land of Egypt: I am the LORD your God.
3_19_34.KJV: But the stranger that dwelleth with you shall be unto you as one born among you, and thou shalt love him as thyself; for ye were strangers in the land of Egypt: I am the LORD your God.
3_19_34.ESV: You shall treat the stranger who sojourns with you as the native among you, and you shall love him as yourself, for you were strangers in the land of Egypt: I am the LORD your God.
3_19_34.NASB: 'The stranger who resides with you shall be to you as the native among you, and you shall love him as yourself, for you were aliens in the land of Egypt; I am the LORD your God.
3_19_34.NLT: Treat them like native-born Israelites, and love them as you love yourself. Remember that you were once foreigners living in the land of Egypt. I am the LORD your God.
3_19_34.WEB: The stranger who lives as a foreigner with you shall be to you as the native-born among you, and you shall love him as yourself; for you lived as foreigners in the land of Egypt. I am Yahweh your God.
3_19_34.CSB17: You will regard the alien who resides with you as the native-born among you. You are to love him as yourself, for you were aliens in the land of Egypt; I am the LORD your God.
3_19_34.AMP: But the stranger who resides with you shall be to you like someone native-born among you; and you shall love him as yourself, for you were strangers in the land of Egypt; I am the LORD your God.
3_19_34.MSG: Treat the foreigner the same as a native. Love him like one of your own. Remember that you were once foreigners in Egypt. I am God, your God.
3_19_34.NIV: The alien living with you must be treated as one of your native-born. Love him as yourself, for you were aliens in Egypt. I am the Lord your God.
3_19_34.NRSVCE: The alien who resides with you shall be to you as the citizen among you; you shall love the alien as yourself, for you were aliens in the land of Egypt: I am the LORD your God.

3_19_35.NKJV: ‘You shall do no injustice in judgment, in measurement of length, weight, or volume.
3_19_35.KJV: Ye shall do no unrighteousness in judgment, in meteyard, in weight, or in measure.
3_19_35.ESV: “You shall do no wrong in judgment, in measures of length or weight or quantity.
3_19_35.NASB: 'You shall do no wrong in judgment, in measurement of weight, or capacity.
3_19_35.NLT: “Do not use dishonest standards when measuring length, weight, or volume.
3_19_35.WEB: “‘You shall do no unrighteousness in judgment, in measures of length, of weight, or of quantity.
3_19_35.CSB17: “Do not be unfair in measurements of length, weight, or volume.
3_19_35.AMP: 'You shall do no wrong in judgment, in measurement of weight or quantity.
3_19_35.MSG: "Don't cheat when measuring length, weight, or quantity.
3_19_35.NIV: “‘Do not use dishonest standards when measuring length, weight or quantity.
3_19_35.NRSVCE: You shall not cheat in measuring length, weight, or quantity.

3_19_36.NKJV: You shall have honest scales, honest weights, an honest ephah, and an honest hin: I am the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt.
3_19_36.KJV: Just balances, just weights, a just ephah, and a just hin, shall ye have: I am the LORD your God, which brought you out of the land of Egypt. weights: Heb. stones
3_19_36.ESV: You shall have just balances, just weights, a just ephah, and a just hin: I am the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt.
3_19_36.NASB: 'You shall have just balances, just weights, a just ephah, and a just hin; I am the LORD your God, who brought you out from the land of Egypt.
3_19_36.NLT: Your scales and weights must be accurate. Your containers for measuring dry materials or liquids must be accurate. I am the LORD your God who brought you out of the land of Egypt.
3_19_36.WEB: You shall have just balances, just weights, a just ephah, and a just hin. I am Yahweh your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt.
3_19_36.CSB17: You are to have honest balances, honest weights, an honest dry measure, and an honest liquid measure; I am the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt.
3_19_36.AMP: You shall have just and accurate balances, just weights, a just ephah, and a just hin. I am the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt.
3_19_36.MSG: Use honest scales and weights and measures. I am God, your God. I brought you out of Egypt.
3_19_36.NIV: Use honest scales and honest weights, an honest ephah and an honest hin. I am the Lord your God, who brought you out of Egypt.
3_19_36.NRSVCE: You shall have honest balances, honest weights, an honest ephah, and an honest hin: I am the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt.

3_19_37.NKJV: ‘Therefore you shall observe all My statutes and all My judgments, and perform them: I am the LORD.’ ”
3_19_37.KJV: Therefore shall ye observe all my statutes, and all my judgments, and do them: I am the LORD.
3_19_37.ESV: And you shall observe all my statutes and all my rules, and do them: I am the LORD.”
3_19_37.NASB: 'You shall thus observe all My statutes and all My ordinances and do them; I am the LORD.''
3_19_37.NLT: “You must be careful to keep all of my decrees and regulations by putting them into practice. I am the LORD.”
3_19_37.WEB: “‘You shall observe all my statutes, and all my ordinances, and do them. I am Yahweh.’”
3_19_37.CSB17: Keep all my statutes and all my ordinances and do them; I am the LORD.”
3_19_37.AMP: You shall observe and keep all My statutes and all My ordinances and do them. I am the LORD.'"
3_19_37.MSG: "Keep all my decrees and all my laws. Yes, do them. I am God."
3_19_37.NIV: “‘Keep all my decrees and all my laws and follow them. I am the Lord.’”
3_19_37.NRSVCE: You shall keep all my statutes and all my ordinances, and observe them: I am the LORD.

3_20_1.NKJV: Then the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
3_20_1.KJV: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,
3_20_1.ESV: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
3_20_1.NASB: Then the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
3_20_1.AMP: Then the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
3_20_1.NIV: Punishments for SinThe Lord said to Moses,
3_20_1.NRSVCE: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying:

3_20_2.NKJV: “Again, you shall say to the children of Israel: ‘Whoever of the children of Israel, or of the strangers who dwell in Israel, who gives any of his descendants to Molech, he shall surely be put to death. The people of the land shall stone him with stones.
3_20_2.KJV: Again, thou shalt say to the children of Israel, Whosoever he be of the children of Israel, or of the strangers that sojourn in Israel, that giveth any of his seed unto Molech; he shall surely be put to death: the people of the land shall stone him with stones.
3_20_2.ESV: “Say to the people of Israel, Any one of the people of Israel or of the strangers who sojourn in Israel who gives any of his children to Molech shall surely be put to death. The people of the land shall stone him with stones.
3_20_2.NASB: 'You shall also say to the sons of Israel: 'Any man from the sons of Israel or from the aliens sojourning in Israel who gives any of his offspring to Molech, shall surely be put to death; the people of the land shall stone him with stones.
3_20_2.NLT: “Give the people of Israel these instructions, which apply both to native Israelites and to the foreigners living in Israel. “If any of them offer their children as a sacrifice to Molech, they must be put to death. The people of the community must stone them to death.
3_20_2.WEB: “Moreover, you shall tell the children of Israel, ‘Anyone of the children of Israel, or of the strangers who live as foreigners in Israel, who gives any of his offspring to Molech; he shall surely be put to death. The people of the land shall stone him with stones.
3_20_2.CSB17: “Say to the Israelites: Any Israelite or alien residing in Israel who gives any of his children to Molech must be put to death; the people of the country are to stone him.
3_20_2.AMP: "Moreover, you shall say to the children of Israel, 'Any Israelite or any stranger residing in Israel who gives any of his children to Molech (the god of the Ammonites) [as a human sacrifice] shall most certainly be put to death; the people of the land shall stone him with stones.
3_20_2.MSG: "Tell the Israelites, Each and every Israelite and foreigner in Israel who gives his child to the god Molech must be put to death. The community must kill him by stoning.
3_20_2.NIV: “Say to the Israelites: ‘Any Israelite or any alien living in Israel who gives any of his children to Molech must be put to death. The people of the community are to stone him.
3_20_2.NRSVCE: Say further to the people of Israel: Any of the people of Israel, or of the aliens who reside in Israel, who give any of their offspring to Molech shall be put to death; the people of the land shall stone them to death.

3_20_3.NKJV: I will set My face against that man, and will cut him off from his people, because he has given some of his descendants to Molech, to defile My sanctuary and profane My holy name.
3_20_3.KJV: And I will set my face against that man, and will cut him off from among his people; because he hath given of his seed unto Molech, to defile my sanctuary, and to profane my holy name.
3_20_3.ESV: I myself will set my face against that man and will cut him off from among his people, because he has given one of his children to Molech, to make my sanctuary unclean and to profane my holy name.
3_20_3.NASB: 'I will also set My face against that man and will cut him off from among his people, because he has given some of his offspring to Molech, so as to defile My sanctuary and to profane My holy name.
3_20_3.NLT: I myself will turn against them and cut them off from the community, because they have defiled my sanctuary and brought shame on my holy name by offering their children to Molech.
3_20_3.WEB: I also will set my face against that person, and will cut him off from among his people because he has given of his offspring to Molech, to defile my sanctuary, and to profane my holy name.
3_20_3.CSB17: I will turn against that man and cut him off from his people, because he gave his offspring to Molech, defiling my sanctuary and profaning my holy name.
3_20_3.AMP: I will also set My face against that man [opposing him, withdrawing My protection from him] and will cut him off from his people [excluding him from the atonement made for them], because he has given some of his children to Molech, so as to defile My sanctuary and profane My holy name.
3_20_3.MSG: I will resolutely reject that man and cut him off from his people. By giving his child to the god Molech he has polluted my Sanctuary and desecrated my holy name.
3_20_3.NIV: I will set my face against that man and I will cut him off from his people; for by giving his children to Molech, he has defiled my sanctuary and profaned my holy name.
3_20_3.NRSVCE: I myself will set my face against them, and will cut them off from the people, because they have given of their offspring to Molech, defiling my sanctuary and profaning my holy name.

3_20_4.NKJV: And if the people of the land should in any way hide their eyes from the man, when he gives some of his descendants to Molech, and they do not kill him,
3_20_4.KJV: And if the people of the land do any ways hide their eyes from the man, when he giveth of his seed unto Molech, and kill him not:
3_20_4.ESV: And if the people of the land do at all close their eyes to that man when he gives one of his children to Molech, and do not put him to death,
3_20_4.NASB: 'If the people of the land, however, should ever disregard that man when he gives any of his offspring to Molech, so as not to put him to death,
3_20_4.NLT: And if the people of the community ignore those who offer their children to Molech and refuse to execute them,
3_20_4.WEB: If the people of the land all hide their eyes from that person, when he gives of his offspring to Molech, and don’t put him to death;
3_20_4.CSB17: But if the people of the country look the other way when that man gives any of his children to Molech, and do not put him to death,
3_20_4.AMP: If the people of the land should ever tolerate that man when he gives any of his children [as a burnt offering] to Molech, and fail to put him to death [as My law requires],
3_20_4.MSG: If the people of the land look the other way as if nothing had happened when that man gives his child to the god Molech and fail to kill him,
3_20_4.NIV: If the people of the community close their eyes when that man gives one of his children to Molech and they fail to put him to death,
3_20_4.NRSVCE: And if the people of the land should ever close their eyes to them, when they give of their offspring to Molech, and do not put them to death,

3_20_5.NKJV: then I will set My face against that man and against his family; and I will cut him off from his people, and all who prostitute themselves with him to commit harlotry with Molech.
3_20_5.KJV: Then I will set my face against that man, and against his family, and will cut him off, and all that go a whoring after him, to commit whoredom with Molech, from among their people.
3_20_5.ESV: then I will set my face against that man and against his clan and will cut them off from among their people, him and all who follow him in whoring after Molech.
3_20_5.NASB: then I Myself will set My face against that man and against his family, and I will cut off from among their people both him and all those who play the harlot after him, by playing the harlot after Molech.
3_20_5.NLT: I myself will turn against them and their families and will cut them off from the community. This will happen to all who commit spiritual prostitution by worshiping Molech.
3_20_5.WEB: then I will set my face against that man, and against his family, and will cut him off, and all who play the prostitute after him, to play the prostitute with Molech, from among their people.
3_20_5.CSB17: then I will turn against that man and his family, and cut off from their people both him and all who follow him in prostituting themselves with Molech.
3_20_5.AMP: then I shall set My face against that man and against his [extended] family, and I will cut off from their people both him and all who follow him in playing the prostitute (commit apostasy) with Molech.
3_20_5.MSG: I will resolutely reject that man and his family, and him and all who join him in prostituting themselves in the rituals of the god Molech I will cut off from their people.
3_20_5.NIV: I will set my face against that man and his family and will cut off from their people both him and all who follow him in prostituting themselves to Molech.
3_20_5.NRSVCE: I myself will set my face against them and against their family, and will cut them off from among their people, them and all who follow them in prostituting themselves to Molech.

3_20_6.NKJV: ‘And the person who turns to mediums and familiar spirits, to prostitute himself with them, I will set My face against that person and cut him off from his people.
3_20_6.KJV: And the soul that turneth after such as have familiar spirits, and after wizards, to go a whoring after them, I will even set my face against that soul, and will cut him off from among his people.
3_20_6.ESV: “If a person turns to mediums and necromancers, whoring after them, I will set my face against that person and will cut him off from among his people.
3_20_6.NASB: 'As for the person who turns to mediums and to spiritists, to play the harlot after them, I will also set My face against that person and will cut him off from among his people.
3_20_6.NLT: “I will also turn against those who commit spiritual prostitution by putting their trust in mediums or in those who consult the spirits of the dead. I will cut them off from the community.
3_20_6.WEB: “‘The person that turns to those who are mediums, and to the wizards, to play the prostitute after them, I will even set my face against that person, and will cut him off from among his people.
3_20_6.CSB17: “Whoever turns to mediums or spiritists and prostitutes himself with them, I will turn against that person and cut him off from his people.
3_20_6.AMP: 'As for the person who turns to mediums [who consult the dead] or to spiritists, to play the prostitute after them, I shall set My face against that person and will cut him off from his people [excluding him from the atonement made for them].
3_20_6.MSG: "I will resolutely reject persons who dabble in the occult or traffic with mediums, prostituting themselves in their practices. I will cut them off from their people.
3_20_6.NIV: “‘I will set my face against the person who turns to mediums and spiritists to prostitute himself by following them, and I will cut him off from his people.
3_20_6.NRSVCE: If any turn to mediums and wizards, prostituting themselves to them, I will set my face against them, and will cut them off from the people.

3_20_7.NKJV: Consecrate yourselves therefore, and be holy, for I am the LORD your God.
3_20_7.KJV: Sanctify yourselves therefore, and be ye holy: for I am the LORD your God.
3_20_7.ESV: Consecrate yourselves, therefore, and be holy, for I am the LORD your God.
3_20_7.NASB: 'You shall consecrate yourselves therefore and be holy, for I am the LORD your God.
3_20_7.NLT: So set yourselves apart to be holy, for I am the LORD your God.
3_20_7.WEB: “‘Sanctify yourselves therefore, and be holy; for I am Yahweh your God.
3_20_7.CSB17: Consecrate yourselves and be holy, for I am the LORD your God.
3_20_7.AMP: You shall consecrate yourselves therefore, and be holy; for I am the LORD your God.
3_20_7.MSG: "Set yourselves apart for a holy life. Live a holy life, because I am God, your God.
3_20_7.NIV: “‘Consecrate yourselves and be holy, because I am the Lord your God.
3_20_7.NRSVCE: Consecrate yourselves therefore, and be holy; for I am the LORD your God.

3_20_8.NKJV: And you shall keep My statutes, and perform them: I am the LORD who sanctifies you.
3_20_8.KJV: And ye shall keep my statutes, and do them: I am the LORD which sanctify you.
3_20_8.ESV: Keep my statutes and do them; I am the LORD who sanctifies you.
3_20_8.NASB: 'You shall keep My statutes and practice them; I am the LORD who sanctifies you.
3_20_8.NLT: Keep all my decrees by putting them into practice, for I am the LORD who makes you holy.
3_20_8.WEB: You shall keep my statutes, and do them. I am Yahweh who sanctifies you.
3_20_8.CSB17: Keep my statutes and do them; I am the LORD who sets you apart.
3_20_8.AMP: You shall keep My statutes and do them. I am the LORD who sanctifies you.
3_20_8.MSG: Do what I tell you; live the way I tell you. I am the God who makes you holy.
3_20_8.NIV: Keep my decrees and follow them. I am the Lord, who makes you holy.
3_20_8.NRSVCE: Keep my statutes, and observe them; I am the LORD; I sanctify you.

3_20_9.NKJV: ‘For everyone who curses his father or his mother shall surely be put to death. He has cursed his father or his mother. His blood shall be upon him.
3_20_9.KJV: For every one that curseth his father or his mother shall be surely put to death: he hath cursed his father or his mother; his blood shall be upon him.
3_20_9.ESV: For anyone who curses his father or his mother shall surely be put to death; he has cursed his father or his mother; his blood is upon him.
3_20_9.NASB: 'If [there is] anyone who curses his father or his mother, he shall surely be put to death; he has cursed his father or his mother, his bloodguiltiness is upon him.
3_20_9.NLT: “Anyone who dishonors father or mother must be put to death. Such a person is guilty of a capital offense.
3_20_9.WEB: “‘For everyone who curses his father or his mother shall surely be put to death: he has cursed his father or his mother; his blood shall be upon him.
3_20_9.CSB17: “If anyone curses his father or mother, he must be put to death. He has cursed his father or mother; his death is his own fault.
3_20_9.AMP: 'If anyone curses his father or mother, he shall most certainly be put to death; he has cursed his father or mother; his blood is on him [that is, he bears full responsibility for the consequences].
3_20_9.MSG: "Any and every person who curses his father or mother must be put to death. By cursing his father or mother he is responsible for his own death.
3_20_9.NIV: “‘If anyone curses his father or mother, he must be put to death. He has cursed his father or his mother, and his blood will be on his own head.
3_20_9.NRSVCE: All who curse father or mother shall be put to death; having cursed father or mother, their blood is upon them.

3_20_10.NKJV: ‘The man who commits adultery with another man’s wife, he who commits adultery with his neighbor’s wife, the adulterer and the adulteress, shall surely be put to death.
3_20_10.KJV: And the man that committeth adultery with another man's wife, even he that committeth adultery with his neighbour's wife, the adulterer and the adulteress shall surely be put to death.
3_20_10.ESV: “If a man commits adultery with the wife of his neighbor, both the adulterer and the adulteress shall surely be put to death.
3_20_10.NASB: 'If [there is] a man who commits adultery with another man's wife, one who commits adultery with his friend's wife, the adulterer and the adulteress shall surely be put to death.
3_20_10.NLT: “If a man commits adultery with his neighbor’s wife, both the man and the woman who have committed adultery must be put to death.
3_20_10.WEB: “‘The man who commits adultery with another man’s wife, even he who commits adultery with his neighbor’s wife, the adulterer and the adulteress shall surely be put to death.
3_20_10.CSB17: “If a man commits adultery with a married woman — if he commits adultery with his neighbor’s wife — both the adulterer and the adulteress must be put to death.
3_20_10.AMP: 'The man who commits adultery with another's wife, even his neighbor's wife, the adulterer and the adulteress shall most certainly be put to death.
3_20_10.MSG: "If a man commits adultery with another man's wife—the wife, say, of his neighbor—both the man and the woman, the adulterer and adulteress, must be put to death.
3_20_10.NIV: “‘If a man commits adultery with another man’s wife—with the wife of his neighbor—both the adulterer and the adulteress must be put to death.
3_20_10.NRSVCE: If a man commits adultery with the wife of his neighbor, both the adulterer and the adulteress shall be put to death.

3_20_11.NKJV: The man who lies with his father’s wife has uncovered his father’s nakedness; both of them shall surely be put to death. Their blood shall be upon them.
3_20_11.KJV: And the man that lieth with his father's wife hath uncovered his father's nakedness: both of them shall surely be put to death; their blood shall be upon them.
3_20_11.ESV: If a man lies with his father's wife, he has uncovered his father's nakedness; both of them shall surely be put to death; their blood is upon them.
3_20_11.NASB: 'If [there is] a man who lies with his father's wife, he has uncovered his father's nakedness; both of them shall surely be put to death, their bloodguiltiness is upon them.
3_20_11.NLT: “If a man violates his father by having sex with one of his father’s wives, both the man and the woman must be put to death, for they are guilty of a capital offense.
3_20_11.WEB: “‘The man who lies with his father’s wife has uncovered his father’s nakedness: both of them shall surely be put to death; their blood shall be upon them.
3_20_11.CSB17: If a man sleeps with his father’s wife, he has violated the intimacy that belongs to his father. Both of them must be put to death; their death is their own fault.
3_20_11.AMP: The man who lies [intimately] with his father's wife has uncovered his father's nakedness; both of them shall most certainly be put to death; their blood is on them.
3_20_11.MSG: "If a man has sex with his father's wife, he has violated his father. Both the man and woman must be put to death; they are responsible for their own deaths.
3_20_11.NIV: “‘If a man sleeps with his father’s wife, he has dishonored his father. Both the man and the woman must be put to death; their blood will be on their own heads.
3_20_11.NRSVCE: The man who lies with his father’s wife has uncovered his father’s nakedness; both of them shall be put to death; their blood is upon them.

3_20_12.NKJV: If a man lies with his daughter-in-law, both of them shall surely be put to death. They have committed perversion. Their blood shall be upon them.
3_20_12.KJV: And if a man lie with his daughter in law, both of them shall surely be put to death: they have wrought confusion; their blood shall be upon them.
3_20_12.ESV: If a man lies with his daughter-in-law, both of them shall surely be put to death; they have committed perversion; their blood is upon them.
3_20_12.NASB: 'If [there is] a man who lies with his daughter-in-law, both of them shall surely be put to death; they have committed incest, their bloodguiltiness is upon them.
3_20_12.NLT: “If a man has sex with his daughter-in-law, both must be put to death. They have committed a perverse act and are guilty of a capital offense.
3_20_12.WEB: “‘If a man lies with his daughter-in-law, both of them shall surely be put to death: they have committed a perversion; their blood shall be upon them.
3_20_12.CSB17: If a man sleeps with his daughter-in-law, both of them must be put to death. They have acted perversely; their death is their own fault.
3_20_12.AMP: If a man lies [intimately] with his daughter-in-law, both of them shall most certainly be put to death; they have committed incest; their blood is on them.
3_20_12.MSG: "If a man has sex with his daughter-in-law, both of them must be put to death. What they have done is perverse. And they are responsible for their own deaths.
3_20_12.NIV: “‘If a man sleeps with his daughter-in-law, both of them must be put to death. What they have done is a perversion; their blood will be on their own heads.
3_20_12.NRSVCE: If a man lies with his daughter-in-law, both of them shall be put to death; they have committed perversion, their blood is upon them.

3_20_13.NKJV: If a man lies with a male as he lies with a woman, both of them have committed an abomination. They shall surely be put to death. Their blood shall be upon them.
3_20_13.KJV: If a man also lie with mankind, as he lieth with a woman, both of them have committed an abomination: they shall surely be put to death; their blood shall be upon them.
3_20_13.ESV: If a man lies with a male as with a woman, both of them have committed an abomination; they shall surely be put to death; their blood is upon them.
3_20_13.NASB: 'If [there is] a man who lies with a male as those who lie with a woman, both of them have committed a detestable act; they shall surely be put to death. Their bloodguiltiness is upon them.
3_20_13.NLT: “If a man practices homosexuality, having sex with another man as with a woman, both men have committed a detestable act. They must both be put to death, for they are guilty of a capital offense.
3_20_13.WEB: “‘If a man lies with a male, as with a woman, both of them have committed an abomination: they shall surely be put to death; their blood shall be upon them.
3_20_13.CSB17: If a man sleeps with a man as with a woman, they have both committed a detestable act. They must be put to death; their death is their own fault.
3_20_13.AMP: If a man lies [intimately] with a male as if he were a woman, both men have committed a detestable (perverse, unnatural) act; they shall most certainly be put to death; their blood is on them.
3_20_13.MSG: "If a man has sex with a man as one does with a woman, both of them have done what is abhorrent. They must be put to death; they are responsible for their own deaths.
3_20_13.NIV: “‘If a man lies with a man as one lies with a woman, both of them have done what is detestable. They must be put to death; their blood will be on their own heads.
3_20_13.NRSVCE: If a man lies with a male as with a woman, both of them have committed an abomination; they shall be put to death; their blood is upon them.

3_20_14.NKJV: If a man marries a woman and her mother, it is wickedness. They shall be burned with fire, both he and they, that there may be no wickedness among you.
3_20_14.KJV: And if a man take a wife and her mother, it is wickedness: they shall be burnt with fire, both he and they; that there be no wickedness among you.
3_20_14.ESV: If a man takes a woman and her mother also, it is depravity; he and they shall be burned with fire, that there may be no depravity among you.
3_20_14.NASB: 'If [there is] a man who marries a woman and her mother, it is immorality; both he and they shall be burned with fire, so that there will be no immorality in your midst.
3_20_14.NLT: “If a man marries both a woman and her mother, he has committed a wicked act. The man and both women must be burned to death to wipe out such wickedness from among you.
3_20_14.WEB: “‘If a man takes a wife and her mother, it is wickedness: they shall be burned with fire, both he and they; that there may be no wickedness among you.
3_20_14.CSB17: If a man marries a woman and her mother, it is depraved. Both he and they must be burned, so that there will be no depravity among you.
3_20_14.AMP: It is immoral and shameful if a man marries a woman and her mother; all three shall be burned in fire, so that there will be no immorality among you.
3_20_14.MSG: "If a man marries both a woman and her mother, that's wicked. All three of them must be burned at the stake, purging the wickedness from the community.
3_20_14.NIV: “‘If a man marries both a woman and her mother, it is wicked. Both he and they must be burned in the fire, so that no wickedness will be among you.
3_20_14.NRSVCE: If a man takes a wife and her mother also, it is depravity; they shall be burned to death, both he and they, that there may be no depravity among you.

3_20_15.NKJV: If a man mates with an animal, he shall surely be put to death, and you shall kill the animal.
3_20_15.KJV: And if a man lie with a beast, he shall surely be put to death: and ye shall slay the beast.
3_20_15.ESV: If a man lies with an animal, he shall surely be put to death, and you shall kill the animal.
3_20_15.NASB: 'If [there is] a man who lies with an animal, he shall surely be put to death; you shall also kill the animal.
3_20_15.NLT: “If a man has sex with an animal, he must be put to death, and the animal must be killed.
3_20_15.WEB: “‘If a man lies with an animal, he shall surely be put to death; and you shall kill the animal.
3_20_15.CSB17: If a man has sexual intercourse with an animal, he must be put to death; you are also to kill the animal.
3_20_15.AMP: If a man has intimate relations with an animal, he shall most certainly be put to death; you shall kill the animal also.
3_20_15.MSG: "If a man has sex with an animal, he must be put to death and you must kill the animal.
3_20_15.NIV: “‘If a man has sexual relations with an animal, he must be put to death, and you must kill the animal.
3_20_15.NRSVCE: If a man has sexual relations with an animal, he shall be put to death; and you shall kill the animal.

3_20_16.NKJV: If a woman approaches any animal and mates with it, you shall kill the woman and the animal. They shall surely be put to death. Their blood is upon them.
3_20_16.KJV: And if a woman approach unto any beast, and lie down thereto, thou shalt kill the woman, and the beast: they shall surely be put to death; their blood shall be upon them.
3_20_16.ESV: If a woman approaches any animal and lies with it, you shall kill the woman and the animal; they shall surely be put to death; their blood is upon them.
3_20_16.NASB: 'If [there is] a woman who approaches any animal to mate with it, you shall kill the woman and the animal; they shall surely be put to death. Their bloodguiltiness is upon them.
3_20_16.NLT: “If a woman presents herself to a male animal to have intercourse with it, she and the animal must both be put to death. You must kill both, for they are guilty of a capital offense.
3_20_16.WEB: “‘If a woman approaches any animal, and lies down with it, you shall kill the woman and the animal. They shall surely be put to death. Their blood shall be upon them.
3_20_16.CSB17: If a woman approaches any animal and mates with it, you are to kill the woman and the animal. They must be put to death; their death is their own fault.
3_20_16.AMP: If a woman approaches any animal to mate with it, you shall kill the woman and the animal; they shall most certainly be put to death; their blood is on them.
3_20_16.MSG: "If a woman has sex with an animal, you must kill both the woman and the animal. They must be put to death. And they are responsible for their deaths.
3_20_16.NIV: “‘If a woman approaches an animal to have sexual relations with it, kill both the woman and the animal. They must be put to death; their blood will be on their own heads.
3_20_16.NRSVCE: If a woman approaches any animal and has sexual relations with it, you shall kill the woman and the animal; they shall be put to death, their blood is upon them.

3_20_17.NKJV: ‘If a man takes his sister, his father’s daughter or his mother’s daughter, and sees her nakedness and she sees his nakedness, it is a wicked thing. And they shall be cut off in the sight of their people. He has uncovered his sister’s nakedness. He shall bear his guilt.
3_20_17.KJV: And if a man shall take his sister, his father's daughter, or his mother's daughter, and see her nakedness, and she see his nakedness; it is a wicked thing; and they shall be cut off in the sight of their people : he hath uncovered his sister's nakedness; he shall bear his iniquity.
3_20_17.ESV: “If a man takes his sister, a daughter of his father or a daughter of his mother, and sees her nakedness, and she sees his nakedness, it is a disgrace, and they shall be cut off in the sight of the children of their people. He has uncovered his sister's nakedness, and he shall bear his iniquity.
3_20_17.NASB: 'If [there is] a man who takes his sister, his father's daughter or his mother's daughter, so that he sees her nakedness and she sees his nakedness, it is a disgrace; and they shall be cut off in the sight of the sons of their people. He has uncovered his sister's nakedness; he bears his guilt.
3_20_17.NLT: “If a man marries his sister, the daughter of either his father or his mother, and they have sexual relations, it is a shameful disgrace. They must be publicly cut off from the community. Since the man has violated his sister, he will be punished for his sin.
3_20_17.WEB: “‘If a man takes his sister, his father’s daughter, or his mother’s daughter, and sees her nakedness, and she sees his nakedness; it is a shameful thing. They shall be cut off in the sight of the children of their people. He has uncovered his sister’s nakedness. He shall bear his iniquity.
3_20_17.CSB17: If a man marries his sister, whether his father’s daughter or his mother’s daughter, and they have sexual relations, it is a disgrace. They are to be cut off publicly from their people. He has had sexual intercourse with his sister; he will bear his iniquity.
3_20_17.AMP: 'If a man takes his sister, his father's daughter or his mother's daughter, so that he sees her nakedness and she sees his nakedness, it is a disgrace; and they shall be cut off in the sight of the sons of their people. He has uncovered his sister's nakedness; he bears [responsibility for] his guilt.
3_20_17.MSG: "If a man marries his sister, the daughter of either his father or mother, and they have sex, that's a disgrace. They must be publicly cut off from their people. He has violated his sister and will be held responsible.
3_20_17.NIV: “‘If a man marries his sister, the daughter of either his father or his mother, and they have sexual relations, it is a disgrace. They must be cut off before the eyes of their people. He has dishonored his sister and will be held responsible.
3_20_17.NRSVCE: If a man takes his sister, a daughter of his father or a daughter of his mother, and sees her nakedness, and she sees his nakedness, it is a disgrace, and they shall be cut off in the sight of their people; he has uncovered his sister’s nakedness, he shall be subject to punishment.

3_20_18.NKJV: If a man lies with a woman during her sickness and uncovers her nakedness, he has exposed her flow, and she has uncovered the flow of her blood. Both of them shall be cut off from their people.
3_20_18.KJV: And if a man shall lie with a woman having her sickness, and shall uncover her nakedness; he hath discovered her fountain, and she hath uncovered the fountain of her blood: and both of them shall be cut off from among their people. discovered: Heb. made naked
3_20_18.ESV: If a man lies with a woman during her menstrual period and uncovers her nakedness, he has made naked her fountain, and she has uncovered the fountain of her blood. Both of them shall be cut off from among their people.
3_20_18.NASB: 'If [there is] a man who lies with a menstruous woman and uncovers her nakedness, he has laid bare her flow, and she has exposed the flow of her blood; thus both of them shall be cut off from among their people.
3_20_18.NLT: “If a man has sexual relations with a woman during her menstrual period, both of them must be cut off from the community, for together they have exposed the source of her blood flow.
3_20_18.WEB: “‘If a man lies with a woman having her monthly period, and uncovers her nakedness; he has made naked her fountain, and she has uncovered the fountain of her blood. Both of them shall be cut off from among their people.
3_20_18.CSB17: If a man sleeps with a menstruating woman and has sexual intercourse with her, he has exposed the source of her flow, and she has uncovered the source of her blood. Both of them are to be cut off from their people.
3_20_18.AMP: If a man lies [intimately] with a woman during her menstrual cycle and uncovers her nakedness, he has exposed her flow, and she has uncovered the flow of her blood; both of them shall be cut off from their people [excluding them from the atonement made for them].
3_20_18.MSG: "If a man sleeps with a woman during her period and has sex with her, he has uncovered her 'fountain' and she has revealed her 'fountain'—both of them must be cut off from their people.
3_20_18.NIV: “‘If a man lies with a woman during her monthly period and has sexual relations with her, he has exposed the source of her flow, and she has also uncovered it. Both of them must be cut off from their people.
3_20_18.NRSVCE: If a man lies with a woman having her sickness and uncovers her nakedness, he has laid bare her flow and she has laid bare her flow of blood; both of them shall be cut off from their people.

3_20_19.NKJV: ‘You shall not uncover the nakedness of your mother’s sister nor of your father’s sister, for that would uncover his near of kin. They shall bear their guilt.
3_20_19.KJV: And thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy mother's sister, nor of thy father's sister: for he uncovereth his near kin: they shall bear their iniquity. uncovereth: Heb. hath made naked
3_20_19.ESV: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your mother's sister or of your father's sister, for that is to make naked one's relative; they shall bear their iniquity.
